live.title: Manchester City vs Southampton - Semi-Final - 25 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Manchester City take on Southampton at Wembley in a high‑stakes FA Cup semi‑final, with a place in the final firmly up for grabs. City will look to impose their control and attacking depth on the big stage, while Southampton arrive determined to stay compact, disrupt the rhythm, and chase a famous upset. With silverware within reach, this clash promises intensity, pressure, and fine margins under the Wembley spotlight. Catch all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: Hamburger SV vs Hoffenheim - MD 31 - 25 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Hamburger SV welcome Hoffenheim in a Matchday 31 showdown featuring contrasting approaches and shared ambition. HSV will seek to harness home support and intensity, while Hoffenheim look to control phases of play and secure crucial points as the pressure builds late in the campaign. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
